item.title: Probably more helpful to think of them not so much as “Canad…

item.description: Probably more helpful to think of them not so much as “Canadian wildfires” but rather “climate change wildfires currently consuming Canada”

item.title: Aww. It looks like someone's Hollywood star needs a chain li…
item.author: Sort of Damocles (@sortofdamocles.bsky.social)
item.description: Aww. It looks like someone's Hollywood star needs a chain link fence, scaffolding, a stripey curtain-tarp, and two or three National Guard soldiers protecting it.
item.content:encoded: Aww. It looks like someone's Hollywood star needs a chain link fence, scaffolding, a stripey curtain-tarp, and two or three National Guard soldiers protecting it.

item.title: A new study found that social media platforms are referring …
item.author: WIRED (@wired.com)
item.description: A new study found that social media platforms are referring people to sites where they can create nonconsensual, sexually explicit deepfakes for as little as $1 an image.
item.content:encoded: A new study found that social media platforms are referring people to sites where they can create nonconsensual, sexually explicit deepfakes for as little as $1 an image.

item.title: Caitlin Clark made history with a brilliant WNBA game and pu…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: Caitlin Clark made history with a brilliant WNBA game and put the league on notice in her post-game interview.
item.content:encoded: Caitlin Clark made history with a brilliant WNBA game and put the league on notice in her post-game interview.

item.title: フリッツ・タウロウ『水車』。タウロウは19世紀ノルウェーの画家であり、同国各地の風景を描きました。彼は水を驚くほど写実的…
item.author: バーナム博物館長 (@barnummuseum.bsky.social)
item.description:
フリッツ・タウロウ『水車』。タウロウは19世紀ノルウェーの画家であり、同国各地の風景を描きました。彼は水を驚くほど写実的に描くことでよく知られており、画像の絵もさざ波立つ水面とこれに反射する光の表現がちょっとありえない領域に達しています(一瞬写真かと思ってしまいますが、拡大してよく見てみると絵です)。また水以外の建物等も丁寧に描き込んであります。
#アート
item.content:encoded:
フリッツ・タウロウ『水車』。タウロウは19世紀ノルウェーの画家であり、同国各地の風景を描きました。彼は水を驚くほど写実的に描くことでよく知られており、画像の絵もさざ波立つ水面とこれに反射する光の表現がちょっとありえない領域に達しています(一瞬写真かと思ってしまいますが、拡大してよく見てみると絵です)。また水以外の建物等も丁寧に描き込んであります。
#アート

item.title: Mamdani left soccer field lights on all night…..the lights u…
item.author: [giver of problems: pro max✨] (@jforjae.bsky.social)
item.description:
Mamdani left soccer field lights on all night…..the lights usually go off at 10pm.

They set a camera up and guess what they saw??

Residents playing soccer with their friends ALL NIGHT. One man said how much he loved it because his friends work late and can’t get to the field before 10pm.
item.content:encoded:
Mamdani left soccer field lights on all night…..the lights usually go off at 10pm.

They set a camera up and guess what they saw??

Residents playing soccer with their friends ALL NIGHT. One man said how much he loved it because his friends work late and can’t get to the field before 10pm.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [100話]クソ女に幸あれ - 岸川瑞樹 | 少年ジャンプ＋ クソ女に幸あれ 岸川瑞樹 <100…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[100話]クソ女に幸あれ - 岸川瑞樹 | 少年ジャンプ＋

クソ女に幸あれ 岸川瑞樹 <100話公開記念!!全話無料！>※一挙公開！キャンペーン期間：7/25まで※ <毎週日曜更新！最新3話無料>「実は4股してるの ゴメンね」。中学生時代、人生で初めての彼女にヒドイ振られ方をした秋吉直（あきよし・すなお）。「もう誰かを好きになることなんてない」と思っていたが、大学生となり映画...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[100話]クソ女に幸あれ - 岸川瑞樹 | 少年ジャンプ＋

クソ女に幸あれ 岸川瑞樹 <100話公開記念!!全話無料！>※一挙公開！キャンペーン期間：7/25まで※ <毎週日曜更新！最新3話無料>「実は4股してるの ゴメンね」。中学生時代、人生で初めての彼女にヒドイ振られ方をした秋吉直（あきよし・すなお）。「もう誰かを好きになることなんてない」と思っていたが、大学生となり映画...

item.title: The wildfire smoke swirling to the east from Minnesota and O…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The wildfire smoke swirling to the east from Minnesota and Ontario isn’t going away, but where it affects air quality will shift over the next few days. Conditions were improving Saturday for parts of the Northeast, a forecaster said.
item.content:encoded: The wildfire smoke swirling to the east from Minnesota and Ontario isn’t going away, but where it affects air quality will shift over the next few days. Conditions were improving Saturday for parts of the Northeast, a forecaster said.

item.title: おはようございます 昨夜、劇場版プロセカを観ました。頑張ってる×ミクちゃんが可哀想で涙が出たし、プロセカのメンバー皆んな…
item.author: りょんぱぱ (@bunpepapa.bsky.social)
item.description:
おはようございます
昨夜、劇場版プロセカを観ました。頑張ってる×ミクちゃんが可哀想で涙が出たし、プロセカのメンバー皆んな頑張ってて涙が出たし、ライブシーンがとても良くて涙が出たし、ずっと泣いてた気がする😆
涙腺がぶっ壊れてるな…

特にニーゴのライブのシーンは良かった！絵も綺麗で可愛くて本当に良かった！円盤あるなら買っちゃうかも知れない。俺、えななんが大好きすぎるんだわ🥰
item.content:encoded:
おはようございます
昨夜、劇場版プロセカを観ました。頑張ってる×ミクちゃんが可哀想で涙が出たし、プロセカのメンバー皆んな頑張ってて涙が出たし、ライブシーンがとても良くて涙が出たし、ずっと泣いてた気がする😆
涙腺がぶっ壊れてるな…

特にニーゴのライブのシーンは良かった！絵も綺麗で可愛くて本当に良かった！円盤あるなら買っちゃうかも知れない。俺、えななんが大好きすぎるんだわ🥰

item.title: ‘It becomes inevitable’: the toxic mix fuelling deadly polit…
item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)
item.description: ‘It becomes inevitable’: the toxic mix fuelling deadly political violence around world
item.content:encoded: ‘It becomes inevitable’: the toxic mix fuelling deadly political violence around world

item.title: おはようございます。本日は、曇り。 一日中湿度が高いようです🥲 お天気も不安定みたいですね。 念のため雨具の用意してお…
item.author: しろまむ (@shiromamu.bsky.social)
item.description:
おはようございます。本日は、曇り。
一日中湿度が高いようです🥲
お天気も不安定みたいですね。
念のため雨具の用意しておいた方がいいかも(昨日妹は急な豪雨を心配して傘でなくカッパを持ってきてました)
皆さま、体調に気をつけてください、どうぞ素敵な土曜日をお過ごしください💖💖

再掲の、百合。
庭でももうすぐ咲くけど、これより少し控えめな子なのです。
白百合と一口に言っても、いろいろ個性があるものだね。
喜多見駅から劇団に行く途中にも、綺麗な百合が咲いてますよ♪

#百合
#庭の花
#ブルスコ写真部
#戦争に反対するお花畑の会
item.content:encoded:
おはようございます。本日は、曇り。
一日中湿度が高いようです🥲
お天気も不安定みたいですね。
念のため雨具の用意しておいた方がいいかも(昨日妹は急な豪雨を心配して傘でなくカッパを持ってきてました)
皆さま、体調に気をつけてください、どうぞ素敵な土曜日をお過ごしください💖💖

再掲の、百合。
庭でももうすぐ咲くけど、これより少し控えめな子なのです。
白百合と一口に言っても、いろいろ個性があるものだね。
喜多見駅から劇団に行く途中にも、綺麗な百合が咲いてますよ♪

#百合
#庭の花
#ブルスコ写真部
#戦争に反対するお花畑の会

item.title: イオン県央店（燕市）駐車場出入り口付近、3歳女児が車にはねられ意識不明の重体 容疑で男を現行犯逮捕
item.author: 47NEWS (@47news.jp)
item.description: イオン県央店（燕市）駐車場出入り口付近、3歳女児が車にはねられ意識不明の重体 容疑で男を現行犯逮捕
item.content:encoded: イオン県央店（燕市）駐車場出入り口付近、3歳女児が車にはねられ意識不明の重体 容疑で男を現行犯逮捕

item.title: How the Trump administration shifted from a "light-touch" ap…
item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)
item.description:
How the Trump administration shifted from a "light-touch" approach to AI policy to an interventionist stance that led to restrictions on top AI models in the US (Leo Schwartz/The Information)

Main Link | Techmeme Permalink
item.content:encoded:
How the Trump administration shifted from a "light-touch" approach to AI policy to an interventionist stance that led to restrictions on top AI models in the US (Leo Schwartz/The Information)

item.title: Last night, Pavement played their first show since November …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Last night, Pavement played their first show since November at the John Waters-hosted Mosswood Meltdown. Following "Harness Your Hopes," they broke out a very unserious cover of "Stairway To Heaven" with Stephen Malkmus singing all incorrect lyrics. (At one point he definitely sang "I like mangos.")
item.content:encoded: Last night, Pavement played their first show since November at the John Waters-hosted Mosswood Meltdown. Following "Harness Your Hopes," they broke out a very unserious cover of "Stairway To Heaven" with Stephen Malkmus singing all incorrect lyrics. (At one point he definitely sang "I like mangos.")

item.title: The size of the Boreal Forest in Canada.... it can't be rake…
item.author: Ed Kwok (@ed-kwok.bsky.social)
item.description: The size of the Boreal Forest in Canada.... it can't be raked....hot dry weather and changing winds from climate change have screwed everything up
item.content:encoded: The size of the Boreal Forest in Canada.... it can't be raked....hot dry weather and changing winds from climate change have screwed everything up

item.title: Iran's Supreme Leader says US breaches show Trump's signatur…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Iran's Supreme Leader says US breaches show Trump's signature is 'worthless' reut.rs/3RGnC0w
item.content:encoded: Iran's Supreme Leader says US breaches show Trump's signature is 'worthless' reut.rs/3RGnC0w

item.title: THREAD: The boy is called a liar. He’s told not to defend hi…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
THREAD: The boy is called a liar. He’s told not to defend himself.

Then the private school owner encourages all of his peers to attack him, one by one. She hits him, repeatedly, with a plastic pipe-like object.

How does this school still exist — and receive state funds? 🧵
item.content:encoded:
THREAD: The boy is called a liar. He’s told not to defend himself.

Then the private school owner encourages all of his peers to attack him, one by one. She hits him, repeatedly, with a plastic pipe-like object.

How does this school still exist — and receive state funds? 🧵

item.title: “This was so delicious that my normally reserved father-in-l…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
“This was so delicious that my normally reserved father-in-law drank the leftover sauce and went looking for more.”

If Marry Me chicken and chicken Florentine had a baby, this creamy one-pot chicken dish would be it. nyti.ms/4vt5lS4
item.content:encoded:
“This was so delicious that my normally reserved father-in-law drank the leftover sauce and went looking for more.”

If Marry Me chicken and chicken Florentine had a baby, this creamy one-pot chicken dish would be it. nyti.ms/4vt5lS4

item.title: Sanctuary 🐈‍⬛🐈 🐄🐖🐓🐐🐄🐐 🐈 Robert Downey Jr. maintains…
item.author: eugeniat2.bsky.social (@eugeniat2.bsky.social)
item.description:
Sanctuary 🐈‍⬛🐈
🐄🐖🐓🐐🐄🐐
🐈
Robert Downey Jr. maintains an animal sanctuary on his Malibu property where he rescued and cares for alpacas, goats, pigs, chickens, cows, and cats.
🐈
Robert Downey Jr. Kindness to animals.
#caturday #sanctuary
item.content:encoded:
Sanctuary 🐈‍⬛🐈
🐄🐖🐓🐐🐄🐐
🐈
Robert Downey Jr. maintains an animal sanctuary on his Malibu property where he rescued and cares for alpacas, goats, pigs, chickens, cows, and cats.
🐈
Robert Downey Jr. Kindness to animals.
#caturday #sanctuary

item.title: Haha, er is een kinderboek over het WK opgedoken dat drie ma…
item.author: Jaap Friso (@jaapfriso.bsky.social)
item.description:
Haha, er is een kinderboek over het WK opgedoken dat drie maanden geleden is verschenen en waarin de finale tussen Spanje en Argentinië gaat.

Spoiler: de wedstrijd in een 2-1 overwinning voor Spanje, dan weten jullie dat maar alvast.

www.thenews.com.pk/latest/14094...
item.content:encoded:
Haha, er is een kinderboek over het WK opgedoken dat drie maanden geleden is verschenen en waarin de finale tussen Spanje en Argentinië gaat.

Spoiler: de wedstrijd in een 2-1 overwinning voor Spanje, dan weten jullie dat maar alvast.

www.thenews.com.pk/latest/14094...

item.title: Bees are disappearing, and our food supply is beginning to c…
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: Bees are disappearing, and our food supply is beginning to collapse. Plants and animals are vanishing, and life is becoming a desert plain. But if humans were to disappear, nature would slowly heal. Rivers would flow more cleanly, forests would grow again, and wildlife would reclaim the Earth.
item.content:encoded: Bees are disappearing, and our food supply is beginning to collapse. Plants and animals are vanishing, and life is becoming a desert plain. But if humans were to disappear, nature would slowly heal. Rivers would flow more cleanly, forests would grow again, and wildlife would reclaim the Earth.

item.title: This is why I love Patagonia! After a 3 am, 12 km hike to mo…
item.author: Christoph Fischer Photography (@beautysurroundsyou.com)
item.description:
This is why I love Patagonia! After a 3 am, 12 km hike to mount Cerro Torre, I was surrounded by drizzle and clouds. It was miserable. But just a few minutes later I was graced by the most beautiful light!

#bluesky #photography #landscape #mountains #sunrise #naturephotography #travel #nature
item.content:encoded:
This is why I love Patagonia! After a 3 am, 12 km hike to mount Cerro Torre, I was surrounded by drizzle and clouds. It was miserable. But just a few minutes later I was graced by the most beautiful light!

#bluesky #photography #landscape #mountains #sunrise #naturephotography #travel #nature
